item.title: ops/rollback/skills snapshot directories created without mode 0700 — skill snapshots world-listable
item.intent: ops/rollback/skills/ and per-snapshot directories must be created with mode 0700 — they contain copies of skill scripts that were active before an install; enumerating them reveals skill history and previous capability state.
item.description: src/evolve/skills/rollback.ts has two mkdirSync calls without mode: line 51 in saveSnapshots() creates ops/rollback/skills/ with default 0755; line 71 in createSnapshot() creates the per-snapshot directory (e.g. ops/rollback/skills/snap-1234abcd) with default 0755. The per-snapshot directory gets cp'd with the entire workspace/skills/ tree. No import from config/defaults.js exists today.
acceptanceCriteria: On a multi-user system, a user other than the agent owner cannot list ops/rollback/skills/ to discover skill installation history
Per-snapshot directories (ops/rollback/skills/snap-*) are not listable by other users — previous skill state and rollback contents remain private
